## Summary

Describe the change and its user-visible effect.

## Validation

- [ ] `dune runtest`
- [ ] relevant smoke or integration checks
- [ ] docs updated when public behavior changed

## Impact

- [ ] no security-sensitive behavior changed
- [ ] security-sensitive behavior changed and is described below
- [ ] routing or fallback behavior changed
- [ ] persistence schema or audit behavior changed

## Notes

Call out any follow-up work, known limitations, or migration concerns.
